description: Normalized archtop graduation template derived from D'Aquisto measurements
source: D'Aquisto graduation sketch + Benedetto 17 graduation_map.json cross-reference
principle: Proportions are consistent across instruments. Shape is universal. Scale is set by wood properties and target frequency.

arch_height_ratio.note: 5/8 inch on approx 10 inch lower bout width

reference_values_mm.note: Benedetto apex higher due to carved top design philosophy

arch_height_ratio.note: 3/4 inch, peak below waist - back arches higher than top

reference_values_mm.note: Back apex at waist zone, not lower bout

application.step_1: Use plate_design/thickness_calculator.py with wood E_L, E_C, density, plate dimensions, target frequency
application.step_3: Set edge_mm = apex_mm * 0.65 (typical ratio) or from stiffness test
application.step_4: Apply normalized_zones template: actual = edge + (apex - edge) * normalized_value
application.missing: archtop_graduation.py - function connecting GraduationMapConfig to plate_design physics

missing_implementation.returns: GraduationMapConfig with apex_mm, edge_mm, arch_height_mm derived from physics not empirical lookup
missing_implementation.blocked_on: PORT-001 - plate_design package must be ported from tap-tone-pi first
